features: [ ] Task 1: Develop the core AI engine – leveraging GPT-5 to analyze transaction patterns and identify potentially fraudulent activity. (Lead: AI/ML Engineer)
[ ] Task 2: Build the initial NFT verification module – focusing on verifying the authenticity of Mossland NFTs. (Lead: Blockchain Engineer)
[ ] Task 3: Implement the basic risk scoring algorithm based on initial data analysis. (Lead: Data Scientist)
**Milestone:** Working prototype of the authentication oracle with initial NFT verification and risk scoring capabilities.
[ ] Task 1: Integrate the AI engine with the NFT verification module. (Lead: Engineering Team)
[ ] Task 2: Conduct rigorous testing of the authentication oracle and risk scoring system, including simulated fraudulent transactions. (Lead: QA Engineer)
[ ] Task 3: Develop a basic user interface for displaying risk scores. (Lead: Frontend Developer)
**Milestone:** Fully integrated authentication oracle with a functional UI and successful test results.
[ ] Task 1: Design the logic for the dynamic issuance protocol, based on risk score thresholds. (Lead: Data Architect)
[ ] Task 2: Develop the smart contracts for managing stablecoin issuance based on the dynamic protocol. (Lead: Blockchain Engineer)
